title: Section 26A
content: 1[26A. Compounding of offences.--Notwithstanding anything contained in the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974), any offence punishable under this Act may, either before the institution of prosecution or with the permission of the Court after the institution of the prosecution, be compounded by the Board on payment to the Board such sum of money as does not exceed the value of the goods in respect of which contravention has been committed.]
footnote: 1. The words in brackets shall stand inserted (date to be notified) by Act 4 of 2010, s. 18.
